content: Supabase ships pgvector on all plans including free. The vecs Python client is the official abstraction: vx = vecs.create_client(DB_CONNECTION); docs = vx.get_or_create_collection(name='docs', dimension=768). Upsert: docs.upsert(records=[('id', vector, metadata_dict)]). Query: docs.query(data=query_vector, limit=5, filters={}, include_metadata=True). HNSW index preferred over IVFFlat: HNSW can be created before or after data load, gives better recall, more memory; IVFFlat must be built after data is loaded. Create HNSW: docs.create_index(method=IndexMethod.hnsw, measure=IndexMeasure.cosine_distance). For serverless, connect via Supabase pooler URL on port 6543 (Supavisor transaction mode), not direct port 5432. asyncpg has prepared-statement incompatibility with PgBouncer transaction mode; prefer psycopg3 with prepare_threshold=None.
